title: Satellite still a 'complement' for overall connectivity, Verizon exec says
content: Satellite connectivity is in the headlines and driving a lot of hype, but its overall role remains dwarfed by terrestrial wireless and wireline networks, says Verizon's Srini Kalapala.

title: Verizon 5G gets match ready for World Cup
content: Verizon private 5G networks to power World Cup referee bodycams and the carrier adds three- to five-times more capacity in and around 16 stadiums for the event.

title: What T-Mobile stopped telling you about Q1 2026
content: T-Mobile quietly dropped its key growth metrics in Q1. Analyst Roger Entner rebuilds the numbers and explains what the silence is hiding.

title: Charter offers second line on same mobile device
content: Spectrum Mobile, Charter's mobile service, now lets customers add a dedicated voice and text number to compatible smartphones for an additional $10 per month. #pressrelease

title: Shane West to take helm of Allo Fiber
content: Allo Fiber said former TDS COO Shane West will succeed Brad Moline as CEO, effective June 1. Moline will remain on the Allo board and serve as president – leased networks.

title: ADB's $70B program will link power grids and digital networks across Asia-Pacific
content: The Asian Development Bank has launched the Pan-Asia Power Grid Initiative and the Asia-Pacific Digital Highway, which aim to transform regional connectivity by linking power and digital networks.
